2026-0273
2026-03-27TBSFinancial Administration ActRelease of Interim Supply for Main Estimates - 2026-27 ** Warrant ** Order directing that a Warrant be prepared authorizing the expenditure of sums set out in Appropriation Act, No. 1, 2026-27 in order to undertake the parliamentary approval process to obtain funding for organizations to implement planned government initiatives. [RELEASE OF INTERIM SUPPLY FOR THE MAIN ESTIMATES - 2026-27]N/A
subject: Release of Interim Supply for Main Estimates - 2026-27 ** Warrant **
precis: Order directing that a Warrant be prepared authorizing the expenditure of sums set out in Appropriation Act, No. 1, 2026-27 in order to undertake the parliamentary approval process to obtain funding for organizations to implement planned government initiatives. [RELEASE OF INTERIM SUPPLY FOR THE MAIN ESTIMATES - 2026-27]
